summary: Phase 13 + P2 Features Testing Complete - All features working correctly. Dark Mode toggle, PWA manifest, WhatsApp button, and Hindi i18n translations all verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 13 + P2 features fully tested. All features working: (13A) Dark Mode with theme toggle in header, (13B) PWA manifest.json valid, (13C) WhatsApp floating button on client dashboard, (P2A) Hindi i18n translations for all Phase 10-12 nav labels.

13A_dark_mode.details: Theme toggle button (moon/sun icon) visible in dashboard header. Click toggles 'dark' class on html element. Sidebar gets dark background (#1e293b), header gets dark backdrop, main content bg changes to #0f172a. Theme persists in localStorage key 'leamss-theme'.

13B_pwa_manifest.details: /manifest.json returns valid JSON with: name='LEAMSS Immigration Portal', short_name='LEAMSS', theme_color='#2a777a', start_url='.', display='standalone'. Apple mobile web app meta tags present in index.html.

13C_whatsapp_button.details: Floating green WhatsApp button (bottom-right, z-50) visible on client dashboard. Click opens wa.me link with pre-filled message including client name. URL format: https://wa.me/919876543210?text=...

P2A_i18n_hindi.details: Language toggle switches between English and Hindi. All Phase 10-12 nav labels translated correctly.

regression_tests.approval_center: PASS - Approval Center loads with pending items

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCK mode - logs to console instead of sending actual emails
